title: The Hidden Manga Multi-Part Prophecy
fact: In the very first opening sequence ('Sono Chi no Sadame'), if you fast-forward through the rapid-fire opening manga panels, it deliberately flashes pages featuring protagonists from Parts 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6, mapping out the entire future of the original universe adaptation in seconds.

title: Jataro's In-Universe Meta Reading Material
fact: While Jotaro is resting inside his jail cell during the opening episodes of Part 3, he is seen reading a physical copy of Weekly Shonen Jump. Zooming in reveals he is reading 'Baoh', Hirohiko Araki's first major sci-fi manga series serialized in the 1980s.

title: Rohan's Early Crowded Cameo
fact: Long before Koichi and Hazamada officially look for his house, manga artist Rohan Kishibe can be spotted walking seamlessly among the background crowd during the introductory pan-shot of Morioh town in Episode 1.

title: The Infamous Duwang Scanlation Tribute
fact: In the anime adaptation of Part 4, a background billboard on a Morioh street displays an advertisement for a concert featuring a band explicitly named 'Duwang'—a direct nod to the iconic, grammatically broken English fan translation from the 1990s.
